expected_behavior: 仅在存在时列阻塞项或待决策项

scenarios.input: Analyze this only. Do not change anything; wait for my confirmation.
expected_behavior: state the conclusion and necessary evidence
include blockers or decisions only when present

scenarios.input: The user supplies a document, API material, design context, and a suggested implementation.
expected_behavior: separate objective, deliverable, and candidate path

scenarios.input: Choose between existing project capability and adding a new dependency.
expected_behavior: report Ready or Needs decision with evidence

scenarios.input: A bug crosses a shared boundary and affects several callers.
expected_behavior: fix the narrowest common root cause
verify equivalent paths without widening scope

scenarios.input: Finish implementation while preserving protocol and knowledge ownership.
expected_behavior: keep plan lifecycle in protocol and writer

comparison.baseline: protocol existed but no explicit host example
comparison.after: explicit zero-write contract in header and shared output contract

comparison.baseline: protocol existed but no explicit host example
context rules prioritized KB and could ask before reading supplied material
comparison.after: evidence-first handoff separates objective, deliverable, and candidate path

comparison.baseline: subjective dual scores and duplicated plan templates
comparison.after: Ready or Needs decision with evidence; Design assets are the sole plan-template owner

comparison.baseline: verification loop did not state the shared-root behavior
comparison.after: caller check, narrow common-root fix, and equivalent-path verification are explicit

comparison.baseline: KB and Templates entry files repeated responsibilities and plan shapes
comparison.after: KB owns long-lived policy, Templates owns KB shapes, and protocol owns lifecycle
